query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dataDemissao, '%Y-%m') as mes, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM employees WHERE dataDemissao >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dataDemissao, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY mes
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(dataDemissao, '%Y-%m') as mes, COUNT(*) as qtd FROM employees WHERE dataDemissao >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dataDemissao, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY mes
